description: Create a .NET 8 Worker Service named 'LogMonitorService' in 'C:\Users\Docker\source\repos\' configured to run as a Windows Service. The service must monitor 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\LogMonitor\drop\' for new '.log' files. For each file, parse the Apache combined log format to count HTTP '404' and '500' status codes. Append a summary line to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\LogMonitor\archive\error_summary.txt' in the format '[FileName]: 404=[Count], 500=[Count]' and move the processed log file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\LogMonitor\archive\'. Ensure the solution is built in the Release configuration and handles File I/O safely to avoid lock exceptions.
